monitoring-analytics-panel.autoInsightsDescription: Key observations detected from visibility and citation trends.
monitoring-analytics-panel.avgPositionSub: Across all responses where your brand is cited
monitoring-analytics-panel.visibilityAnalyticsDescription: Track how your brand visibility changes across the selected AI models.
monitoring-analytics-panel.aiSentimentDescription: Distribution of responses that mention your brand: positive, neutral, or negative.
monitoring-analytics-panel.factualAccuracyDescription: Share of responses backed by at least one source.
monitoring-analytics-panel.topCitedPagesDescription: Citation coverage across the most referenced URLs.
monitoring-analytics-panel.brandVisibilityDescription: Track your brand performance over time against your competitors.
monitoring-analytics-panel.modelVisibilityMetricDescription: Number of AI responses where your brand is mentioned.
monitoring-analytics-panel.modelVisibilityMetricDescriptionWithComp: With a competitor filter, only co-mentions are counted (your brand + selected competitor).
monitoring-analytics-panel.brandMentionTemplate: {{label}} mentions your brand in {{mentions}}/{{total}} responses in the current scope.
monitoring-analytics-panel.coMentionsTemplate: {{competitor}} is co-mentioned with your brand in {{mentions}} responses out of {{total}} after filtering.
monitoring-analytics-panel.competitionTemplate: {{competitor}} is the most cited competitor in the current scope.
monitoring-analytics-panel.topCitedTemplate: {{url}} is the most cited page by AI in the current scope.
monitoring-analytics-panel.qualityTemplate: The average visibility score across filtered responses is {{score}}/100.

monitoring-filters-panel.heroEmptyTitle: Monitoring is still waiting for a strong signal
monitoring-filters-panel.heroEmptySummary: No response surfaces a clear narrative for this scope yet.
monitoring-filters-panel.heroEmptyMicroCopy: Widen the period or relax some filters to reveal a trend.
monitoring-filters-panel.heroDiffuseTitle: AI visibility is still too diffuse
monitoring-filters-panel.heroDiffuseSummary: The active period does not reveal a clear leader between your brand and the tracked competitors.
monitoring-filters-panel.heroDiffuseMicroCopy: Keep a wider window to let a first dominance signal emerge.
monitoring-filters-panel.leaderNarrativeTakesLead: {{leader}} takes the lead on AI visibility over {{periodLabel}}
monitoring-filters-panel.leaderNarrativeSlightEdge: {{leader}} keeps a slight edge on AI visibility over {{periodLabel}}
monitoring-filters-panel.momentumStrongMicroCopy: Momentum is accelerating on the most recent signals.
monitoring-filters-panel.momentumDownMicroCopy: Pace is slowing at the end of the period and deserves attention.
monitoring-filters-panel.momentumStableMicroCopy: Presence remains steady without a recent break.
monitoring-filters-panel.heroSummaryLeaderVsRunnerUp: {{share}}% AI share of voice, {{gap}} pts ahead of {{runnerUp}}.
monitoring-filters-panel.heroSummaryLeaderSolo: {{mentions}} mentions detected, or {{mentionRate}}% of tracked responses.

monitoring-activity-panel.mentionMissingHint: The brand does not appear explicitly
monitoring-activity-panel.toneQualificationHint: Overall qualification of the response tone

prompts-workspace.promptsAndResponsesBaseline: Catalog of prompts and response flows with shared filters.
prompts-workspace.topCompetitorsDescription: Refine the response view by the competitor you want to track.
prompts-workspace.promptActionsDescription: Quickly access the most useful actions for this prompt.
prompts-workspace.runNowDescription: Launches a new run immediately on the selected AI models.
prompts-workspace.saveBeforeRunDescription: Save this prompt first before running it.
prompts-workspace.editPromptDescription: Update the text, AI coverage, or cadence.
prompts-workspace.copyPromptDescription: Copy the prompt text to the clipboard.
prompts-workspace.openDetailsDescription: Show the full sheet with status and metrics.
prompts-workspace.viewResponsesDescription: Open the responses tab for this prompt directly.
prompts-workspace.deletePromptDescription: Permanently remove this prompt from the list.
prompts-workspace.aiCoverageDescription: Select the models to include in the view.
prompts-workspace.noResponsesForFilters: No responses for the selected filters.
prompts-workspace.promptMetricsGlobalDescription: Metrics aggregated across every AI attached to this prompt.
prompts-workspace.promptMetricsModelDescription: Metrics limited to this AI for this prompt.
prompts-workspace.cadenceOverrideDescription: A dedicated cadence is active for this AI in the current view.
prompts-workspace.cadenceInheritedDescription: This cadence is inherited from the main prompt setting.
prompts-workspace.noActiveAi: No active AI for this prompt.
prompts-workspace.noPromptsForFilters: No prompt matches the current filters.
prompts-workspace.archivedPromptsHelp: Archived prompts are removed from monitoring and hidden by default.
prompts-workspace.editorCreateBaseline: Create the prompt, define AI coverage, and set the analysis cadence from one place.
prompts-workspace.editorEditBaseline: Update prompt text, AI coverage, and cadence from a dedicated page.
prompts-workspace.editorPromptDescription: Write the exact query you want to monitor across the selected AI.
prompts-workspace.editorPromptPlaceholder: Example: What are the best CRM tools for a B2B SaaS SMB?
prompts-workspace.editorCoverageDescription: Choose the providers and model names that should stay active on this prompt.
prompts-workspace.editorCadenceDescription: Choose one global rhythm, or enable a custom cadence for specific AI when needed.
prompts-workspace.editorCadenceModeGlobalDescription: Same cadence for every selected AI
prompts-workspace.editorCadenceModePerAiDescription: Customize the baseline cadence for specific AI
prompts-workspace.perAiCustomCadencesDescription: Each AI appears below. Click `Set custom cadence` to change one AI individually.
prompts-workspace.scheduleHeaderGlobalDescription: One cadence applied across the whole prompt coverage.
prompts-workspace.scheduleHeaderPerAiDescription_one: {{count}} AI override can diverge from the baseline.
prompts-workspace.scheduleHeaderPerAiDescription_other: {{count}} AI overrides can diverge from the baseline.
prompts-workspace.scheduleScopeDescription: Choose one rhythm for the whole prompt, or keep a shared baseline and customize it per AI.
prompts-workspace.scheduleScopeGlobalDescription: Same cadence for all selected AI
prompts-workspace.scheduleScopePerAiDescription: Override the baseline for specific AI
prompts-workspace.scheduleCurrentResultGlobalDescription: This cadence will be used for every AI in the prompt coverage.
prompts-workspace.scheduleCurrentResultPerAiDescription_on: {{count}} AI override can diverge from the baseline.
prompts-workspace.scheduleCurrentResultPerAiDescription_ot: {{count}} AI overrides can diverge from the baseline.
prompts-workspace.scheduleQuickPresetsDescription: Pick a readable rhythm first. Use the advanced section only if you need a custom cron rule.
prompts-workspace.scheduleMainCadenceDescription: Used as the main cadence for the full prompt coverage.
prompts-workspace.scheduleSharedFallbackDescription: Used as the shared fallback before any per-AI override.
prompts-workspace.advancedCustomRuleDescription: Only open this if presets are not enough.
prompts-workspace.scheduleGlobalModeDescription: Every AI attached to this prompt follows the same analysis cadence.
prompts-workspace.schedulePerAiOverridesDescription: Keep a global baseline, then accelerate or slow down specific AI models.
prompts-workspace.overrideCronHelp: Use 5 cron fields for the override.

monitoring-mobile.defaultTagline: Keep a clear read on your AI visibility, even on the go.
monitoring-mobile.analysisPeriodDescription: Swipe horizontally to change time window.
monitoring-mobile.recentSignalsDescription: Critical alerts and latest prompts stay accessible without leaving monitoring.
monitoring-mobile.customRangeDescription: Choose a precise time range to narrow the monitoring view.

perception.donutSubtitle: How well your brand is aligned in AI responses.
perception.heatmapDescription: Compare which models understand each perception axis best.
perception.trendDescription: Track positioning clarity, factual reliability, and response tone over {{periodLabel}} to measure optimization impact.
perception.trendDefinitionPositioning: How well AI can link the brand to its category and core promise.
perception.trendDefinitionFactual: How reliable and verifiable the information used by AI remains.
perception.trendDefinitionSentiment: The overall tone AI uses when talking about your brand, from negative to positive.
perception.scoreCardPositioningHint: Current average score out of 100 for how clearly AI associates the brand with its positioning
perception.scoreCardFactualHint: Average score out of 100 for how reliable and verifiable the information remains
perception.scoreCardSentimentHint: Average score out of 100 for the tone AI uses when talking about your brand
perception.optimizeActionsDescription: Buttons on the right can create draft actions you can use immediately.
perception.optimizeActionsEmpty: No generated action yet. Click `Fix` in the right column.
perception.optimizeActionsCreateError: Unable to create the optimization action
perception.topErrorsEmptyDescription: Analyzed AI responses match your brand reference for the selected filters.
perception.topErrorsSheetDescription: Details about the detected error and the recommended optimization action.
perception.topErrorsFallbackIssue: The backend reported a perception gap on this axis.
perception.topErrorsFallbackImpact: This gap reduces how well AI understands the brand.
perception.topErrorsFallbackGeneratedContent: Clarify {{brand}} on this axis across the website and source content.
perception.topErrorsGeneratedPositioningTitle: Positioning is still not cited clearly enough
perception.topErrorsGeneratedPositioningIssue: {{score}}% of responses correctly cite {{brand}}. Some models still fail to connect the brand to the right context.
perception.topErrorsGeneratedPositioningImpact: The brand may be under-selected or show up off-topic in AI recommendations.
perception.topErrorsGeneratedPositioningContent: Strengthen the value proposition and use cases directly in landing pages, headings, and FAQs.
perception.topErrorsGeneratedCitationIssue: {{score}}% of responses contain a usable citation. AI often responds without explicit support from your pages.
perception.topErrorsGeneratedCitationImpact: The narrative is less verifiable and the brand feels less factual in results.
perception.topErrorsGeneratedCitationContent: Add FAQ blocks, proof points, statistics, and reference pages that are easy to cite on key product topics.
perception.topErrorsGeneratedUseCaseIssue: {{score}}% of covered prompts lead to a clear mention of {{brand}}. AI still does not connect the brand strongly enough to target scenarios.
perception.topErrorsGeneratedUseCaseImpact: Visibility opportunities on intent-driven queries remain partial.
perception.topErrorsGeneratedUseCaseContent: Make priority use cases more visible in navigation, hero sections, and comparison pages.
perception.topErrorsGeneratedSentimentTitle: Sentiment is still too neutral or negative
perception.topErrorsGeneratedSentimentIssue: Sentiment score is {{score}}/100. Responses still lack differentiating signals or lean too much toward alternatives.
perception.topErrorsGeneratedSentimentImpact: The brand is less convincing in AI summaries and loses desirability.
perception.topErrorsGeneratedSentimentContent: Document value proof, customer outcomes, and differentiators more clearly to steer responses toward stronger positive signals.
perception.topErrorsGeneratedCompetitiveIssue: Competitive score is {{score}}/100. AI still places the brand behind competitors too often in comparisons.
perception.topErrorsGeneratedCompetitiveImpact: Consideration traffic can be captured by other players on comparison queries.
perception.topErrorsGeneratedCompetitiveContent: Add comparison pages, differentiation tables, and proof content about the project's real competitors.
perception.brandCanonUnavailableDescription: Edit the brand source of truth: category, use cases, features, and competitors.

perception-brand-canon.heroNoSignals: Perception signals will appear here as soon as enough responses are available.
perception-brand-canon.heroStrongestNeedsWork: {{strongest}} lifts the score, while {{weakest}} remains the axis to strengthen.
perception-brand-canon.heroBestAxisSummary: {{label}} is currently the best understood axis.
perception-brand-canon.editorPageBaseline: Edit the source of truth for the brand: positioning, use cases, features, and competitors.
perception-brand-canon.editableFieldsDescription: Saved changes are reused across the brand and perception views.
perception-brand-canon.fieldBrandHint: Name shown in AI responses and summary views.
perception-brand-canon.fieldCategoryHint: Primary sector or category used to position the brand.
perception-brand-canon.fieldPositioningHint: Reference description that clearly explains what the brand does.
perception-brand-canon.fieldUseCasesDescription: Use cases that should stand out in AI responses.
perception-brand-canon.fieldFeaturesDescription: Features the brand should be recognized for immediately.
perception-brand-canon.footerDefaultMessage: Saving the brand reference and competitors.
perception-brand-canon.competitorsDescription: Add or update competitors used in comparisons and AI analyses.
perception-brand-canon.validationMissingCompetitorName: Each competitor must have a name or be removed.

sidebar.noProjectsInOrganization: No projects in this organization yet.
